TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-pear_lubi 2020s

S.FORM: eniqan ka kingan anu ka seediq anu ka waga kiya waga so meniq so anu ka a neepah na seediq nii ma.
S.TRANSL: 有一個人在他自己的田裡。
There was a person who was in his own field.

S.FORM: m ma kika wa musa lmamu wada hiya ka kingan ka so riso hari gaga mosa a mosa mangan a u musa mapa anu ka anu ka hei na qhuni kiya ma.
S.TRANSL: 他去採（水果）後，來了個年輕人，去背起了樹的果實。
As he went picking (the fruits), there came a young person who went to carry the tree fruits.

S.FORM: anu ka taapa anu ka anu ka rulu tmediq anu ka mapa kingal rawa napa na anu ka hei qhuni kii yaani qutirodux ini kelai ma.
S.TRANSL: 然後，（他）騎著腳踏車，帶著一籃水果，或許是芭樂吧，我不知道。
Then, (he) rode a bike, taking a basket of fruits, which were probably guavas. I don't know.

S.FORM: kika wada so tmalang madis anu ka a kingal rawa a qutirodux kii di ma.
S.TRANSL: 他像是拿著那些水果在跑。
It's like he ran taking those fruits.

S.FORM: wa eniqan btunux ka elu kiya ma wada moda a so a ptebuk hiya di ma wada.
S.TRANSL: 他經過的路上有石頭，而他撞到了（石頭）。
There was a stone on his way, and he bumped into it.

S.FORM: takun ka anu ka seediq a mapa anu ka a qutirodux kii di ma wada tdoruy kana ka anu ka hei na a napa na qutirodux kii di ma.
S.TRANSL: 在路上有顆石頭。當他經過時，撞到了（那顆石頭）然後就跌倒了。他背的所有芭樂也都滾落了下來。
There was a stone on the road. As he went past, he bumped into it and fell. All those guavas that he carried rolled down.

S.FORM: gisu ka teru a riso so laqi ha di ma.
S.TRANSL: 然後，來了三個男孩，像是年紀比較小一點的。
Then, there came three boys, who seemed rather young.

S.FORM: kiya ka wada di wada mswaye di ma.
S.TRANSL: 然後，他們便離開，和（男孩）分開了。
Then, they went away, and separated (with the boy).

S.FORM: moda elu ka anu ka laqi kii wa qmita kingan anu ka anu ka uh bnubung na a tunux mntena hari a so a a bosi peni.
S.TRANSL: 那些小孩經過路邊，看到一個用來蓋頭用的東西，有點像是帽子。
Those kids went passed the road and saw something used for covering the head, which was kind of like a hat.

S.FORM: wa qmita kii deheya kii di ma waga na wa na splawa a wa na hrenang quwaq na mlawa anu ka miyuk quwaq na mlawa anu ka seediq wada taapa jidensha madis a a hei qhuni kii di ma.
S.TRANSL: 他們看到了（帽子）之後，便大叫，用嘴巴發出聲音吹口哨，呼喊已經騎著腳踏車帶走芭樂的那個人。
As they saw it (that hat), they called out, making noises and whistling with their mouths, to the person who had already gone riding the bicycle with the fruits.

S.FORM: ma kiya naq a wada mswaye di.
S.TRANSL: 就是那樣。他們分開了。
That's all. They separated.
我說完了。
I finished.
